testcase.name: test_ssh_port_open_to_world_is_detected

failure.message: AssertionError: CKV_AWS_25 not found in failed checks — scanner may not have fired. Failed: [] assert 'CKV_AWS_25' in set()

testcase.failure: tests\test_iac001_open_firewall_rules.py:49: in test_ssh_port_open_to_world_is_detected assert SSH_CHECK in fails, ( E AssertionError: CKV_AWS_25 not found in failed checks — scanner may not have fired. E Failed: [] E assert 'CKV_AWS_25' in set()

testcase.name: test_violation_fixture_produces_failures

failure.message: AssertionError: Checkov found zero violations — scanner may not be working assert set()

testcase.failure: tests\test_iac001_open_firewall_rules.py:57: in test_violation_fixture_produces_failures assert fails, "Checkov found zero violations — scanner may not be working" E AssertionError: Checkov found zero violations — scanner may not be working E assert set()

testcase.name: test_iac001_score_for_violation_fixture

failure.message: AssertionError: Score should be <100 when open firewall rules are present assert 100.0 < 100

testcase.failure: tests\test_iac001_open_firewall_rules.py:84: in test_iac001_score_for_violation_fixture assert result["normalized_0_100"] < 100, ( E AssertionError: Score should be <100 when open firewall rules are present E assert 100.0 < 100

testcase.name: test_violation_has_more_public_failures_than_compliant

failure.message: AssertionError: Violation fixture should have more public-access failures than compliant assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len(set()) + and 0 = len(set())

testcase.failure: tests\test_iac003_public_storage_access.py:138: in test_violation_has_more_public_failures_than_compliant assert len(viol_fails) > len(comp_fails), ( E AssertionError: Violation fixture should have more public-access failures than compliant E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len(set()) E + and 0 = len(set())

testcase.name: test_public_s3_violates_cis

failure.message: AssertionError: No CIS S3 public-access block checks triggered. Expected any of {'CKV_AWS_53', 'CKV_AWS_55', 'CKV_AWS_54', 'CKV_AWS_56'} Failed: [] assert set()

testcase.failure: tests\test_iac004_cis_benchmark.py:87: in test_public_s3_violates_cis assert triggered, ( E AssertionError: No CIS S3 public-access block checks triggered. E Expected any of {'CKV_AWS_53', 'CKV_AWS_55', 'CKV_AWS_54', 'CKV_AWS_56'} E Failed: [] E assert set()

testcase.name: test_compliant_dir_higher_cis_score_than_violations
testcase.failure: tests\test_iac004_cis_benchmark.py:147: in test_compliant_dir_higher_cis_score_than_violations assert comp_pct > viol_pct, ( E AssertionError: Expected compliant (0.0%) > violations (0.0%) E assert 0.0 > 0.0

testcase.name: test_spot_check_coverage
